meta.name: Louvain clustering (raw counts)
meta.description: Cluster raw counts with the Louvain algorithm (normalize -> log1p -> PCA -> neighbors -> Louvain), the classic alternative to Leiden. Produces obs['louvain']. For unprocessed data such as Xenium.
meta.provenance: scanpy clustering tutorial (sc.tl.louvain). Targets unprocessed raw-count data such as Xenium.

readme: Same preprocessing as 'Preprocess & cluster (raw counts)' but ends in Louvain community detection instead of Leiden, for comparison. Uses the igraph flavor. Produces `obs['louvain']`.
